claim_text: Researchers in social-science genetics must avoid mischaracterizations of genetic associations, which could lead to misperceptions about the influence of genetics on phenotypes.
evidence_summary: Researchers must be especially vigilant to avoid misinterpretations. One of the many concerns is that a genetic association will be mischaracterized as 'the gene for X.'
